blended.narrative: Welch Village is looking at a significant storm over the next 48 hours, with 19 inches of snowfall of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 15 ft. Looking ahead, 22 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 18" of heavy snow, highs of 30°F. Expect variable conditions.
Tomorrow: 2.5" of snow, highs of 27°F, winds around 21 mph. Expect powder.
Wednesday: 2.2" of snow, highs of 36°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
